steps.title: Apply the factoring from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: Divide by $4$: $x-7 = -6$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Dividing all terms in the given equation by $4$ yields $\frac{4x}{4}-\frac{28}{4}=-\frac{24}{4}$, or $x-7=-6$. Therefore, the value of $x-7$ is $-6$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $4x-28$, not $x-7$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
